title: pelargonium viscidum
intro: Pelargonium viscidum, also known as sticky-leaved geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium viscidum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide relief from stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
